name: an untagged rule from a non-Node ecosystem (e.g. django, rails, spring) still resolves a development path
command: ok=1; for r in g-django-x g-rails-x g-spring-x g-laravel-x; do bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/classify-path.sh" --rule-id "$r" --applies-to '{}' 2>e.txt; grep -q 'development_paths=fullstack' e.txt || ok=0; done; [ "$ok" -eq 1 ] && echo non-node-ecosystems-pathed 1>&2
